docs.title: #data-pipeline thread
docs.content:
Thread in #data-pipeline:
lena: PR #77 in prbe-knowledge adds batched queue claiming. Worth reviewing carefully.
mike: I looked at it. The batch size is 200 but the DLQ logic didn't get updated for the new shape.
lena: Yeah PR #77 is the right fix but we need a follow-up for DLQ handling.
mike: Leaving a review comment on PR #77 now.
lena: Also, does this affect the Granola sync? Granola has its own queue priority.

docs.title: PR #77: Batch queue claim for ingestion worker
docs.content:
PR #77 in prbe-knowledge: Batch queue claim for ingestion worker
Author: lena
Description: Changes Worker._claim_one to claim up to 200 rows per tick using FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED. Reduces DB round-trips by 60x under high load. DLQ logic unchanged in this PR.

expected_edges.note: Slack thread specifically discusses PR #77 in prbe-knowledge by name, including technical critique of its DLQ handling
